signupData.goalsElaboration: Postpartum (6 months), rebuild core strength and pelvic floor function. General fitness, regain pre-pregnancy strength. Gradual progression, no rush.
signupData.locationElaboration: Home - resistance bands, 10/15/20 lb dumbbells, exercise ball, yoga mat
signupData.injuries: Postpartum diastasis recti, pelvic floor weakness. Working with pelvic PT. Avoids high-impact movements, exercises that cause leaking or coning.
signupData.experienceElaboration: 4 months back to exercise, cleared by doctor. Previously moderately active before pregnancy. Trains Mon/Wed/Fri at 10 AM during baby naps, 30-45 min.

onboardingMessages: I'm 6 months postpartum and trying to rebuild my core strength and pelvic floor. My doctor cleared me for exercise.
I work out at home during baby naps - I have resistance bands, light dumbbells up to 20 lb, an exercise ball, and a yoga mat.
I have diastasis recti and pelvic floor weakness - I'm working with a pelvic PT. I need to avoid anything that causes coning or leaking. Gentle progression please.
